blockers.required_artifact: raw audit payload for observed preparation and execution cases
blockers.fallback_posture: preserve screenshot-backed observation as partial evidence only
blockers.next_action: capture or receive raw audit payload and bind it to source version and timestamp

blockers.required_artifact: three repeated runs per observed case with result, evaluated steps, and trajectory hash
blockers.fallback_posture: do not claim replayability or deterministic stability
blockers.next_action: run or receive replay captures against a pinned demo or repository version

blockers.required_artifact: concrete source versions, timestamps, and raw payloads for example registry entries
blockers.owner_boundary: canonical source retrieval or authorized artifact package required
blockers.fallback_posture: retain examples as explicit non-validating stubs
blockers.next_action: promote only records with canonical source, scope, version, and authority boundary

blockers.required_artifact: captured canonical validation and build result
blockers.fallback_posture: do not claim passing CI or build
